name: samplenew_00012079
chinese: 不带说了不认账的，当初你说的，要给小雨买了钢琴
english: No more denying what you said before, you promised to buy a piano for Xiao Yu.

name: sample_00006804
chinese: 哈哈哈哈。
english: Hahahaha.

name: sample_00004552
chinese: 啃下红星这块硬骨头。
english: Bite off this tough bone of the Red Star.

name: sample_00001261
chinese: 卑鄙无耻下流的小人。
english: A despicable, shameless and lowly villain.

name: sample_00004671
chinese: 不会吧？不可能，樊小妹不是这种人。
english: Really? Impossible, Fan Xiaomei is not that kind of person.

name: samplenew_00051433
chinese: 我是说，我以前没有谈过恋爱。
english: I mean, I've never been in a relationship before.

name: sample_00003592
chinese: 你跟那个鲍家明在一块，在咖啡馆里头，他给你弹琴唱歌的时候。
english: You were with Bao Jiaming, in the cafe, when he was playing the piano and singing for you.

name: sample_00001205
chinese: 要是我出事了。
english: If something happens to me...

name: sample_00002689
chinese: 前一段我让彩平给我带沟里去了，也跟着钓什么金龟婿。
english: A while ago, I asked Caiping to take me to the ditch, and I also tried to catch what is called a "golden son-in-law".

name: sample_00006475
chinese: 哦，通过沈维这件事儿，我和我老公都决定。
english: Oh, through this matter with Shen Wei, both my husband and I have made a decision.

name: sample_00006665
chinese: 我就不能再让他们老为我这事担心了，我自己能解决的事
english: I can't let them worry about this for me anymore, I can handle it myself.

name: sample_00001022
chinese: 我是我父母抱养的
english: I was adopted by my parents.

name: sample_00006143
chinese: 玫玫啊，不是志诚每个月都给你生活费吗？你干吗要那么辛苦工作呢？
english: Meme, doesn't Zhicheng give you living expenses every month? Why do you have to work so hard?

name: sample_00002385
chinese: 那你照耀一个。
english: Then you shine one.

name: sample_00006803
chinese: 我猜跟她平时自尊心强有关，你看她过得多光鲜，她可能不希望我们看到她
english: I guess it's related to her strong self-esteem usually, you see how glamorous she is, she probably doesn't want us to see her.

name: sample_00006326
chinese: 兴许啊，只热乎一阵子。
english: Perhaps, it's just a fleeting warmth.

name: sample_00000831
chinese: 好好好，你觉得你没错是吗？没错？那我告诉你，你就是错了。你错就错在没有将心比心。
english: Alright, alright, alright, you think you're not wrong, right? Not wrong? Well, let me tell you, you are wrong. Your mistake lies in not putting yourself in others' shoes.

name: sample_00004389
chinese: 如果是大病的话，还得看看能不能找到熟人，这样子咱们能更加了解病情，跟主治医生也说得上话。小曲她有个朋友好像就在那儿当医生的，你需不需要我打个电话问问小曲？
english: If it's a serious illness, we need to see if we can find someone we know. This way, we can better understand the condition and communicate with the attending physician. Xiao Qu has a friend who seems to be a doctor there, do you want me to call Xiao Qu and ask?

name: sample_00001544
chinese: 你给他打电话干什么呀，他自己的事还忙不过来呢。
english: Why are you calling him? He can't even handle his own affairs.

name: sample_00005005
chinese: 我想我是最有资格陪在你的身边，和你共同面对这件事的人。
english: I believe I am the most qualified person to stand by your side and face this matter with you.

name: sample_00007001
chinese: 把时间花在这种浮夸的事情上，那太浪费了。还是让老谭继续消受吧。
english: Spending time on such ostentatious matters is such a waste. Let's just let Old Tan continue to endure it.

name: sample_00005083
chinese: 怎么模糊了？看不出是女人吗？
english: How did it become so blurry? Can't you tell I'm a woman?

name: sample_00006047
chinese: 凭什么让他把孩子接走啊？你们应该联系我！
english: Why should he be allowed to take the child away? You should have contacted me!

name: sample_00004697
chinese: 还能够美容养颜，那你就多喝点呗。
english: It can also beautify and nourish the skin. You can drink more.

name: sample_00003090
chinese: 难道我这一生，都要这样为这个家庭战斗吗？
english: Do I have to fight for this family for my whole life?

name: sample_00003049
chinese: 你让我去台湾，是担心形势不利吗？
english: Are you asking me to go to Taiwan because you are worried about the situation?

name: samplenew_00044286
chinese: 我也不怨传文哥，我就怨命。
english: I don't blame Chuanwen either, I just blame fate.

name: sample_00005938
chinese: 我们在一个车上，你死了，我连块骨头都没断。
english: We are in a car, you died, and I didn't even break a bone.

name: sample_00004876
chinese: 说的越来越真诚
english: The words are becoming more and more sincere.

name: samplenew_00023955
chinese: 寡人要是韩王，先拿你的人头祭奠那些冤死士卒。
english: If I were the King of Han, I would first take your head to mourn those soldiers who died unjustly.
